programme.desc: Dr. Chris is back working with the Polar Bear Alert Team to prevent polar bears from getting too close to the town of Churchill, Manitoba; he heads to the Canadian Polar Bear Habitat in Cochrane, Ontario, to treat a bear with an injured elbow.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: For 44 years, David Suzuki has taken people around the world to explore science, technology, and nature - and now for something completely different.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: Following the careers of pioneering primate researchers Jane Goodall, Dian Fossey and Biruté Galdikas.

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singer's rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators.

programme.title: Fatboy Slim: Right Here, Right Now

programme.title: 100 Foot Wave
